title: Question: Implicit wreal support
body:
---


Author Name: **j briquet**
Original Redmine Message: 2209 from https://www.veripool.org



---

Hello,

I would like to know if implicit declaration of wreal is supported. Let's say, I have a top module that instantiates several sub-modules, but some of inputs/outputs/inout of these sub-modules are defined as wreal,
however in the top module I interconnect the sub-modules together without redefining the connection net as wreal, and keep it as an implicit wire, is there any way that this implicit wire could be defined as wreal. I know it works for a bit but not for wreal. Is there anyway to support it ? 
Actually, in large mixed-signal designs, we could instantiate several real number models and connect them without defining the net type. By the way, the commercial netlister give a netlist free of wreal declarations. 
Redefining each nets manually is unpleasant and error prone. 
Thanks. 

J-P
